TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Niue kanatal == Niue itiraay i sifo'ay katimol a kanatal kitakit i Taypinyang, kararaay to New Zealand ka'amis to 2,400 kongli; kaetip o Tonga, ka'amis o Samoa, kawal o Cook kanatal. Niue kitakit masatamocolay kanatal ato mataliyokay no karat ko kasakanatal, dadahal 260 pinfang kongli. I 2022 miheca tamdaw salongan ira ko 2000 tamdaw, finacadan ono Polynesians tamdaw. o nisowalan o Niue a sowal ato Inkiris a sowal. O Konglihuy ko pitooran a Niue kiwkay. pasadak to kinaira a passiflora, 'afinang ato pawli. Ira ko imingay no falo a kaysya. Pa'aca to kitti ko satadamaanay sakinaira no kicay. Tadamaanay maci o Alofi. O Niue ato New Zealand o madoedoay kakihar no pakoniraay lekapot. Likisi Sa'ayaw kasasiseping no Europe ato Niue kanatal itira i 1774 miheca, ci James Cook ko 'ayaw pakanengnengay to Niue kanatal, nika kana'ayen patalasekal. Saka panganganen ningra konini a kanatal to Savage kanatal , o makataray tamdaw kanatal han. Ikor i 1846 miheca, ira ko dintokay no London (London Missionary Society) tayni i Niue kanatal. I 1900 miheca mala o nicalapan to no Inkiris. I 1901 miheca mala o no Cook kanatal ko salongan mapakapot i New Zealand. I 1974 miheca mihayda ko laocan no New Zealand to Niue kimpo, mihayda to pakoniyah mikowan a salongoc no Niue. I 2004 miheca 1 folad, mahafelot no fa'edetay faliyos Heta (Cyclone Heta) ko Niue itiya, saka 2 tamdaw ko cimapatayay, polong no kanatal maemin malefek makari'ang, polong no kaloloma' ato dengan cecay paisingan maemin masapanahal no fa'edetay faliyos, awaay to pinaloma no finawlan. Nanoya o tamdaw no kanatal ala tairaira sato i New Zealand, nao 1500 ko tamdaw malowan to dengan 500 to k otamdaw, saka caay to pakadotoc ko sifo no Niue. Masamatira o Niue sifo paretatenga sato o maanan to masasi pakoniraay ko kalekapot to New Zealand sato, miala to 1974 mihecaan a Niue misiikeday ratoh a telekan, citodong ko New Zealand padamso to 'ayaway ni calapan a Niue to kaloira kicay ato sakadadeak a padama. Imatini salongan ira ko 20,000 Niue tamdaw maro'ay i New Zealand, milayap haca ko Niue to 800 'ofad N.Z payso (500 US) to mihecaan a sadama, salongan no tamdaw kahacecay to mihecaan solongan 5,000 N.Z ko padamso. Midotoc kasatelekan to pakonira lekapot, o Niue citodong haca to no New Zealand a finawlan, mapatodong to no New Zealand a paspoto. Nai 2003 miheca sarakatay caay ka cili'aca ko finawlan no Niue kitakit to calay, itira i 2008 miheca mala o patodongay ko kanatal to saki kaemangay to OLPC a kitakit . Nika i 2011 miheca nawhani caay to pakafilo pa'aca to VSAT (Wiysin), saka misawad to OLPC halaka no kitakit . Kaitiraan Itira i notimolan Taypinyang ko Niue kitakit, o dadahal nira 269km², kawali no Tonga kitakit, kaitiraan no Niue i 19°03′48″S 169°52′11″W. toloay ko todongan a sa'etal kicay kalawacay masakaratay pala, o awaayay ko sera. Romi'ad O ciherangay ko romi'ad no Niue kitakit, ka'oradan itira i 11 folad tangasa saka tosa miheca to 4 folad. Sa'etal no kadademakan Ira ko 14 silsil no niyaro' no Niue kitakit Finawlan Laloma'an no kitakit a finawlan kerod sato malowan, i 1970 miheca ira ko 5,130 tamdaw, tangasa 2020 miheca dengan to 1,630 tamdaw, itira i tadamanay maci Alofi salongan ira 900 tamdaw. roma salongan ira 3.1 'ofad tamdaw maro'ay i New Zealand (2018 miheca), salongan 5,000 tamdaw maro'ay i Australia (2017 miheca) . Sician Niue kitakit o laocan hongti patirengay to kimpo, roma no New Zealand hongti kitakit, o New Zealand hongti citodong to kakeridan no Niue kitakit. o kakitaan no Niue kitakit o sakakaay no sifo. Lomaocan Laocan no Niue kitakit o pakoniraan lekapotan New Zealand ko mitelekay citodongay no Niue kitakit. mirocokay to cecayay laoca ko Laocan no Niue , nai 20 a iing a sakapot, oya 14 iing tamdaw o nano 14 a sa'etal niyaro' a nicikerohan, roma 6 tamdaw o kapolongan ni pili'an ko sakaira. Cecay lekad no laocan 3 miheca. O kakeridan no laocan o nai papotalay no laocan nipili'an, awaay ko kacitodong a mitopa. O pitopa no laocan o "lahodayay 'alomanay ko paya maalaay" lodocan. O mitopaay o cikikaay to no New Zealand, salongan ira ko 3 folad ko aro' i Niue, o papili'en tamdaw salongan ira ko 12 folad ko aro' i Niue. Satena' to kitakit Satena' to kitakit no Niue o sofitay no New Zealand sifo ko padamso a midama. Kicay Kacacofaliw no payso no Niue o no New Zealand. Pirarakatan O pirarakatan a tayal ko sakaira no kicay no Niue, malitoloay ko sakaira no micomoday (tosaay o nipifotingan ato liomahan). I 2006 miheca, o mirarakatay tangasa to 160 'ofad no NZ payso ko micomoday. O New Zealand hikoki ko patadoay to sakaromakat no Niue a dengan hikoki kosi, cecay lipay ira ko patatikoay hikoki tayra i Auckland. Anini i, mipacomahad ko sifo to piraraka a dademaken, sapatongal to tamdaw no hotilo, papitanam to piceroh no pakademay i pirarakatan no Niue. Ponka Kiwiko Cecayay ko daykako pitilidan i Niue: Niue Saint Clement daykako kiwiko kakoyin. Pitiya Nawhani awaay ko tamdaw, caay ka papina ko pitiya i Niue. Ira ko Niue tilifi ato Yangkong Radio, nao hoso kosi i Niue ko mikowanay dademak. Ira ko cecay sinpon "Niue star". Roma ira ho ko roma calayan pitiya. kacacofelan a demak O Niue ato New Zealand o pakoniraay lekapot kasakihar, saka maocor no New Zealand ko tadamanay citodongay to tayal. O Niue o nano Taypinyang kasakitakit kalalicayan a lekapot. 2007 miheca 12 folad 12 romi'ad, o Niue ato Congko makacacofelay.
S.PHON: == nio~u~uə kanataɾ == nio~u~uə itiraaj i sifo~uʡaj katimo~uɾ a kanataɾ kitakit i tajpinjaŋ, kararaaj to~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ kaʡamis to~u *,*** ko~uŋɾi; kaətip o~u to~uŋa, kaʡamis o~u samo~ua, kawaɾ o~u ʦo~uo~uk kanataɾ. nio~u~uə kitakit masatamo~uʦo~uɾaj kanataɾ ato~u mataɾijo~ukaj no~u karat ko~u kasakanataɾ, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ *** pinfaŋ ko~uŋɾi. i **** miħəʦa tamɬ~ɮaw saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u **** tamɬ~ɮaw, finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~uno~u po~uɾjnəsians tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u niso~uwaɾan o~u nio~u~uə a so~uwaɾ ato~u inkiris a so~uwaɾ. o~u ko~uŋɾiħo~u~uj ko~u pito~uo~uran a nio~u~uə kiwkaj. pasaɬ~ɮak to~u kinaira a passifɾo~ura, ʡafinaŋ ato~u pawɾi. ira ko~u imiŋaj no~u faɾo~u a kajsja. paʡaʦa to~u kitti ko~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj sakinaira no~u kiʦaj. taɬ~ɮamaanaj maʦi o~u aɾo~ufi. o~u nio~u~uə ato~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ o~u maɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj kakiħar no~u pako~uniraaj ɾəkapo~ut. ɾikisi saʡajaw kasasisəpiŋ no~u əo~u~uro~upə ato~u nio~u~uə kanataɾ itira i **** miħəʦa, ʦi *aməs ʦo~uo~uk ko~u ʡajaw pakanəŋnəŋaj to~u nio~u~uə kanataɾ, nika kanaʡajən pataɾasəkaɾ. saka paŋaŋanən niŋra ko~unini a kanataɾ to~u sab~va*ə kanataɾ , o~u makataraj tamɬ~ɮaw kanataɾ ħan. iko~ur i **** miħəʦa, ira ko~u ɬ~ɮinto~ukaj no~u ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un (ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un missio~unarj so~uʦiətj) tajni i nio~u~uə kanataɾ. i **** miħəʦa maɾa o~u niʦaɾapan to~u no~u inkiris. i **** miħəʦa maɾa o~u no~u ʦo~uo~uk kanataɾ ko~u saɾo~uŋan mapakapo~ut i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ. i **** miħəʦa miħajɬ~ɮa ko~u ɾao~uʦan no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ to~u nio~u~uə kimpo~u, miħajɬ~ɮa to~u pako~unijaħ miko~uwan a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u nio~u~uə. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maħafəɾo~ut no~u faʡəɬ~ɮətaj faɾijo~us ħəta (ʦjʦɾo~unə ħəta) ko~u nio~u~uə itija, saka * tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʦimapatajaj, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kanataɾ maəmin maɾəfək makariʡaŋ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kaɾo~uɾo~umaʡ ato~u ɬ~ɮəŋan ʦəʦaj paisiŋan maəmin masapanaħaɾ no~u faʡəɬ~ɮətaj faɾijo~us, awaaj to~u pinaɾo~uma no~u finawɾan. nano~uja o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kanataɾ aɾa tairaira sato~u i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, nao~u **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw maɾo~uwan to~u ɬ~ɮəŋan *** to~u k o~utamɬ~ɮaw, saka ʦaaj to~u pakaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ko~u sifo~u no~u nio~u~uə. masamatira o~u nio~u~uə sifo~u parətatəŋa sato~u o~u maanan to~u masasi pako~uniraaj ko~u kaɾəkapo~ut to~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ sato~u, miaɾa to~u **** miħəʦaan a nio~u~uə misiikəɬ~ɮaj rato~uħ a təɾəkan, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u ʡajawaj ni ʦaɾapan a nio~u~uə to~u kaɾo~uira kiʦaj ato~u sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəak a paɬ~ɮama. imatini saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u **,*** nio~u~uə tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡaj i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, miɾajap ħaʦa ko~u nio~u~uə to~u *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ n.* pajso~u (*** o~u~us) to~u miħəʦaan a saɬ~ɮama, saɾo~uŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw kaħaʦəʦaj to~u miħəʦaan so~uɾo~uŋan *,*** n.* ko~u paɬ~ɮamso~u. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ kasatəɾəkan to~u pako~unira ɾəkapo~ut, o~u nio~u~uə ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħaʦa to~u no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ a finawɾan, mapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ a paspo~uto~u. nai **** miħəʦa sarakataj ʦaaj ka ʦiɾiʡaʦa ko~u finawɾan no~u nio~u~uə kitakit to~u ʦaɾaj, itira i **** miħəʦa maɾa o~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ko~u kanataɾ to~u saki kaəmaŋaj to~u o~uɾpʦ a kitakit . nika i **** miħəʦa nawħani ʦaaj to~u pakafiɾo~u paʡaʦa to~u b~vsat (wijsin), saka misawaɬ~ɮ to~u o~uɾpʦ ħaɾaka no~u kitakit . kaitiraan itira i no~utimo~uɾan tajpinjaŋ ko~u nio~u~uə kitakit, o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ nira ***km*, kawaɾi no~u to~uŋa kitakit, kaitiraan no~u nio~u~uə i *********s **********w. to~uɾo~uaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a saʡətaɾ kiʦaj kaɾawaʦaj masakarataj paɾa, o~u awaajaj ko~u səra. ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u ʦiħəraŋaj ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u nio~u~uə kitakit, kaʡo~uraɬ~ɮan itira i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ taŋasa saka to~usa miħəʦa to~u * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. saʡətaɾ no~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan ira ko~u ** siɾsiɾ no~u nijaro~uʡ no~u nio~u~uə kitakit finawɾan ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u kitakit a finawɾan kəro~uɬ~ɮ sato~u maɾo~uwan, i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw, taŋasa **** miħəʦa ɬ~ɮəŋan to~u *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw, itira i taɬ~ɮamanaj maʦi aɾo~ufi saɾo~uŋan ira *** tamɬ~ɮaw. ro~uma saɾo~uŋan ira *.* ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡaj i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ (**** miħəʦa), saɾo~uŋan *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡaj i ao~u~ustraɾia (**** miħəʦa) . siʦian nio~u~uə kitakit o~u ɾao~uʦan ħo~uŋti patirəŋaj to~u kimpo~u, ro~uma no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ ħo~uŋti kitakit, o~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ ħo~uŋti ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u nio~u~uə kitakit. o~u kakitaan no~u nio~u~uə kitakit o~u sakakaaj no~u sifo~u. ɾo~umao~uʦan ɾao~uʦan no~u nio~u~uə kitakit o~u pako~uniraan ɾəkapo~utan nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ ko~u mitəɾəkaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u nio~u~uə kitakit. miro~uʦo~ukaj to~u ʦəʦajaj ɾao~uʦa ko~u ɾao~uʦan no~u nio~u~uə , nai ** a iiŋ a sakapo~ut, o~uja ** iiŋ tamɬ~ɮaw o~u nano~u ** a saʡətaɾ nijaro~uʡ a niʦikəro~uħan, ro~uma * tamɬ~ɮaw o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan ni piɾiʡan ko~u sakaira. ʦəʦaj ɾəkaɬ~ɮ no~u ɾao~uʦan * miħəʦa. o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ɾao~uʦan o~u nai papo~utaɾaj no~u ɾao~uʦan nipiɾiʡan, awaaj ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a mito~upa. o~u pito~upa no~u ɾao~uʦan o~u "ɾaħo~uɬ~ɮajaj ʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u paja maaɾaaj" ɾo~uɬ~ɮo~uʦan. o~u mito~upaaj o~u ʦikikaaj to~u no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u aro~uʡ i nio~u~uə, o~u papiɾiʡən tamɬ~ɮaw saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u aro~uʡ i nio~u~uə. satənaʡ to~u kitakit satənaʡ to~u kitakit no~u nio~u~uə o~u so~ufitaj no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ sifo~u ko~u paɬ~ɮamso~u a miɬ~ɮama. kiʦaj kaʦaʦo~ufaɾiw no~u pajso~u no~u nio~u~uə o~u no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ. pirarakatan o~u pirarakatan a tajaɾ ko~u sakaira no~u kiʦaj no~u nio~u~uə, maɾito~uɾo~uaj ko~u sakaira no~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj (to~usaaj o~u nipifo~utiŋan ato~u ɾio~umaħan). i **** miħəʦa, o~u mirarakataj taŋasa to~u *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ no~u n* pajso~u ko~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj. o~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ ħiko~uki ko~u pataɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u sakaro~umakat no~u nio~u~uə a ɬ~ɮəŋan ħiko~uki ko~usi, ʦəʦaj ɾipaj ira ko~u patatiko~uaj ħiko~uki tajra i ao~u~uʦkɾanɬ~ɮ. anini i, mipaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u sifo~u to~u piraraka a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, sapato~uŋaɾ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ħo~utiɾo~u, papitanam to~u piʦəro~uħ no~u pakaɬ~ɮəmaj i pirarakatan no~u nio~u~uə. po~unka kiwiko~u ʦəʦajaj ko~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan i nio~u~uə: nio~u~uə saint ʦɾəmənt ɬ~ɮajkako~u kiwiko~u kako~ujin. pitija nawħani awaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ka papina ko~u pitija i nio~u~uə. ira ko~u nio~u~uə tiɾifi ato~u jaŋko~uŋ raɬ~ɮio~u, nao~u ħo~uso~u ko~usi i nio~u~uə ko~u miko~uwanaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj sinpo~un "nio~u~uə star". ro~uma ira ħo~u ko~u ro~uma ʦaɾajan pitija. kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u nio~u~uə ato~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ o~u pako~uniraaj ɾəkapo~ut kasakiħar, saka mao~uʦo~ur no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ ko~u taɬ~ɮamanaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u tajaɾ. o~u nio~u~uə o~u nano~u tajpinjaŋ kasakitakit kaɾaɾiʦajan a ɾəkapo~ut. **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u nio~u~uə ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u makaʦaʦo~ufəɾaj.
S.FORM: == Niue kanatal == Niue itiraay i sifo'ay katimol a kanatal kitakit i Taypinyang, kararaay to New Zealand ka'amis to 2,400 kongli; kaetip o Tonga, ka'amis o Samoa, kawal o Cook kanatal. Niue kitakit masatamocolay kanatal ato mataliyokay no karat ko kasakanatal, dadahal 260 pinfang kongli. I 2022 miheca tamdaw salongan ira ko 2000 tamdaw, finacadan ono Polynesians tamdaw. o nisowalan o Niue a sowal ato Inkiris a sowal. O Konglihuy ko pitooran a Niue kiwkay. pasadak to kinaira a passiflora, 'afinang ato pawli. Ira ko imingay no falo a kaysya. Pa'aca to kitti ko satadamaanay sakinaira no kicay. Tadamaanay maci o Alofi. O Niue ato New Zealand o madoedoay kakihar no pakoniraay lekapot. Likisi Sa'ayaw kasasiseping no Europe ato Niue kanatal itira i 1774 miheca, ci James Cook ko 'ayaw pakanengnengay to Niue kanatal, nika kana'ayen patalasekal. Saka panganganen ningra konini a kanatal to Savage kanatal , o makataray tamdaw kanatal han. Ikor i 1846 miheca, ira ko dintokay no London (London Missionary Society) tayni i Niue kanatal. I 1900 miheca mala o nicalapan to no Inkiris. I 1901 miheca mala o no Cook kanatal ko salongan mapakapot i New Zealand. I 1974 miheca mihayda ko laocan no New Zealand to Niue kimpo, mihayda to pakoniyah mikowan a salongoc no Niue. I 2004 miheca 1 folad, mahafelot no fa'edetay faliyos Heta (Cyclone Heta) ko Niue itiya, saka 2 tamdaw ko cimapatayay, polong no kanatal maemin malefek makari'ang, polong no kaloloma' ato dengan cecay paisingan maemin masapanahal no fa'edetay faliyos, awaay to pinaloma no finawlan. Nanoya o tamdaw no kanatal ala tairaira sato i New Zealand, nao 1500 ko tamdaw malowan to dengan 500 to k otamdaw, saka caay to pakadotoc ko sifo no Niue. Masamatira o Niue sifo paretatenga sato o maanan to masasi pakoniraay ko kalekapot to New Zealand sato, miala to 1974 mihecaan a Niue misiikeday ratoh a telekan, citodong ko New Zealand padamso to 'ayaway ni calapan a Niue to kaloira kicay ato sakadadeak a padama. Imatini salongan ira ko 20,000 Niue tamdaw maro'ay i New Zealand, milayap haca ko Niue to 800 'ofad N.Z payso (500 US) to mihecaan a sadama, salongan no tamdaw kahacecay to mihecaan solongan 5,000 N.Z ko padamso. Midotoc kasatelekan to pakonira lekapot, o Niue citodong haca to no New Zealand a finawlan, mapatodong to no New Zealand a paspoto. Nai 2003 miheca sarakatay caay ka cili'aca ko finawlan no Niue kitakit to calay, itira i 2008 miheca mala o patodongay ko kanatal to saki kaemangay to OLPC a kitakit . Nika i 2011 miheca nawhani caay to pakafilo pa'aca to VSAT (Wiysin), saka misawad to OLPC halaka no kitakit . Kaitiraan Itira i notimolan Taypinyang ko Niue kitakit, o dadahal nira 269km², kawali no Tonga kitakit, kaitiraan no Niue i 19°03′48″S 169°52′11″W. toloay ko todongan a sa'etal kicay kalawacay masakaratay pala, o awaayay ko sera. Romi'ad O ciherangay ko romi'ad no Niue kitakit, ka'oradan itira i 11 folad tangasa saka tosa miheca to 4 folad. Sa'etal no kadademakan Ira ko 14 silsil no niyaro' no Niue kitakit Finawlan Laloma'an no kitakit a finawlan kerod sato malowan, i 1970 miheca ira ko 5,130 tamdaw, tangasa 2020 miheca dengan to 1,630 tamdaw, itira i tadamanay maci Alofi salongan ira 900 tamdaw. roma salongan ira 3.1 'ofad tamdaw maro'ay i New Zealand (2018 miheca), salongan 5,000 tamdaw maro'ay i Australia (2017 miheca) . Sician Niue kitakit o laocan hongti patirengay to kimpo, roma no New Zealand hongti kitakit, o New Zealand hongti citodong to kakeridan no Niue kitakit. o kakitaan no Niue kitakit o sakakaay no sifo. Lomaocan Laocan no Niue kitakit o pakoniraan lekapotan New Zealand ko mitelekay citodongay no Niue kitakit. mirocokay to cecayay laoca ko Laocan no Niue , nai 20 a iing a sakapot, oya 14 iing tamdaw o nano 14 a sa'etal niyaro' a nicikerohan, roma 6 tamdaw o kapolongan ni pili'an ko sakaira. Cecay lekad no laocan 3 miheca. O kakeridan no laocan o nai papotalay no laocan nipili'an, awaay ko kacitodong a mitopa. O pitopa no laocan o "lahodayay 'alomanay ko paya maalaay" lodocan. O mitopaay o cikikaay to no New Zealand, salongan ira ko 3 folad ko aro' i Niue, o papili'en tamdaw salongan ira ko 12 folad ko aro' i Niue. Satena' to kitakit Satena' to kitakit no Niue o sofitay no New Zealand sifo ko padamso a midama. Kicay Kacacofaliw no payso no Niue o no New Zealand. Pirarakatan O pirarakatan a tayal ko sakaira no kicay no Niue, malitoloay ko sakaira no micomoday (tosaay o nipifotingan ato liomahan). I 2006 miheca, o mirarakatay tangasa to 160 'ofad no NZ payso ko micomoday. O New Zealand hikoki ko patadoay to sakaromakat no Niue a dengan hikoki kosi, cecay lipay ira ko patatikoay hikoki tayra i Auckland. Anini i, mipacomahad ko sifo to piraraka a dademaken, sapatongal to tamdaw no hotilo, papitanam to piceroh no pakademay i pirarakatan no Niue. Ponka Kiwiko Cecayay ko daykako pitilidan i Niue: Niue Saint Clement daykako kiwiko kakoyin. Pitiya Nawhani awaay ko tamdaw, caay ka papina ko pitiya i Niue. Ira ko Niue tilifi ato Yangkong Radio, nao hoso kosi i Niue ko mikowanay dademak. Ira ko cecay sinpon "Niue star". Roma ira ho ko roma calayan pitiya. kacacofelan a demak O Niue ato New Zealand o pakoniraay lekapot kasakihar, saka maocor no New Zealand ko tadamanay citodongay to tayal. O Niue o nano Taypinyang kasakitakit kalalicayan a lekapot. 2007 miheca 12 folad 12 romi'ad, o Niue ato Congko makacacofelay.
S.PHON: == nio~u~uə kanataɾ == nio~u~uə itiraaj i sifo~uʡaj katimo~uɾ a kanataɾ kitakit i tajpinjaŋ, kararaaj to~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ kaʡamis to~u *,*** ko~uŋɾi; kaətip o~u to~uŋa, kaʡamis o~u samo~ua, kawaɾ o~u ʦo~uo~uk kanataɾ. nio~u~uə kitakit masatamo~uʦo~uɾaj kanataɾ ato~u mataɾijo~ukaj no~u karat ko~u kasakanataɾ, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ *** pinfaŋ ko~uŋɾi. i **** miħəʦa tamɬ~ɮaw saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u **** tamɬ~ɮaw, finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~uno~u po~uɾjnəsians tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u niso~uwaɾan o~u nio~u~uə a so~uwaɾ ato~u inkiris a so~uwaɾ. o~u ko~uŋɾiħo~u~uj ko~u pito~uo~uran a nio~u~uə kiwkaj. pasaɬ~ɮak to~u kinaira a passifɾo~ura, ʡafinaŋ ato~u pawɾi. ira ko~u imiŋaj no~u faɾo~u a kajsja. paʡaʦa to~u kitti ko~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj sakinaira no~u kiʦaj. taɬ~ɮamaanaj maʦi o~u aɾo~ufi. o~u nio~u~uə ato~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ o~u maɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uaj kakiħar no~u pako~uniraaj ɾəkapo~ut. ɾikisi saʡajaw kasasisəpiŋ no~u əo~u~uro~upə ato~u nio~u~uə kanataɾ itira i **** miħəʦa, ʦi *aməs ʦo~uo~uk ko~u ʡajaw pakanəŋnəŋaj to~u nio~u~uə kanataɾ, nika kanaʡajən pataɾasəkaɾ. saka paŋaŋanən niŋra ko~unini a kanataɾ to~u sab~va*ə kanataɾ , o~u makataraj tamɬ~ɮaw kanataɾ ħan. iko~ur i **** miħəʦa, ira ko~u ɬ~ɮinto~ukaj no~u ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un (ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un missio~unarj so~uʦiətj) tajni i nio~u~uə kanataɾ. i **** miħəʦa maɾa o~u niʦaɾapan to~u no~u inkiris. i **** miħəʦa maɾa o~u no~u ʦo~uo~uk kanataɾ ko~u saɾo~uŋan mapakapo~ut i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ. i **** miħəʦa miħajɬ~ɮa ko~u ɾao~uʦan no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ to~u nio~u~uə kimpo~u, miħajɬ~ɮa to~u pako~unijaħ miko~uwan a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u nio~u~uə. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, maħafəɾo~ut no~u faʡəɬ~ɮətaj faɾijo~us ħəta (ʦjʦɾo~unə ħəta) ko~u nio~u~uə itija, saka * tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʦimapatajaj, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kanataɾ maəmin maɾəfək makariʡaŋ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kaɾo~uɾo~umaʡ ato~u ɬ~ɮəŋan ʦəʦaj paisiŋan maəmin masapanaħaɾ no~u faʡəɬ~ɮətaj faɾijo~us, awaaj to~u pinaɾo~uma no~u finawɾan. nano~uja o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kanataɾ aɾa tairaira sato~u i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, nao~u **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw maɾo~uwan to~u ɬ~ɮəŋan *** to~u k o~utamɬ~ɮaw, saka ʦaaj to~u pakaɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ko~u sifo~u no~u nio~u~uə. masamatira o~u nio~u~uə sifo~u parətatəŋa sato~u o~u maanan to~u masasi pako~uniraaj ko~u kaɾəkapo~ut to~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ sato~u, miaɾa to~u **** miħəʦaan a nio~u~uə misiikəɬ~ɮaj rato~uħ a təɾəkan, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u ʡajawaj ni ʦaɾapan a nio~u~uə to~u kaɾo~uira kiʦaj ato~u sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəak a paɬ~ɮama. imatini saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u **,*** nio~u~uə tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡaj i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, miɾajap ħaʦa ko~u nio~u~uə to~u *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ n.* pajso~u (*** o~u~us) to~u miħəʦaan a saɬ~ɮama, saɾo~uŋan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw kaħaʦəʦaj to~u miħəʦaan so~uɾo~uŋan *,*** n.* ko~u paɬ~ɮamso~u. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ kasatəɾəkan to~u pako~unira ɾəkapo~ut, o~u nio~u~uə ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ħaʦa to~u no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ a finawɾan, mapato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ a paspo~uto~u. nai **** miħəʦa sarakataj ʦaaj ka ʦiɾiʡaʦa ko~u finawɾan no~u nio~u~uə kitakit to~u ʦaɾaj, itira i **** miħəʦa maɾa o~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ko~u kanataɾ to~u saki kaəmaŋaj to~u o~uɾpʦ a kitakit . nika i **** miħəʦa nawħani ʦaaj to~u pakafiɾo~u paʡaʦa to~u b~vsat (wijsin), saka misawaɬ~ɮ to~u o~uɾpʦ ħaɾaka no~u kitakit . kaitiraan itira i no~utimo~uɾan tajpinjaŋ ko~u nio~u~uə kitakit, o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ nira ***km*, kawaɾi no~u to~uŋa kitakit, kaitiraan no~u nio~u~uə i *********s **********w. to~uɾo~uaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a saʡətaɾ kiʦaj kaɾawaʦaj masakarataj paɾa, o~u awaajaj ko~u səra. ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u ʦiħəraŋaj ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u nio~u~uə kitakit, kaʡo~uraɬ~ɮan itira i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ taŋasa saka to~usa miħəʦa to~u * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. saʡətaɾ no~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan ira ko~u ** siɾsiɾ no~u nijaro~uʡ no~u nio~u~uə kitakit finawɾan ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u kitakit a finawɾan kəro~uɬ~ɮ sato~u maɾo~uwan, i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw, taŋasa **** miħəʦa ɬ~ɮəŋan to~u *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw, itira i taɬ~ɮamanaj maʦi aɾo~ufi saɾo~uŋan ira *** tamɬ~ɮaw. ro~uma saɾo~uŋan ira *.* ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡaj i nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ (**** miħəʦa), saɾo~uŋan *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw maro~uʡaj i ao~u~ustraɾia (**** miħəʦa) . siʦian nio~u~uə kitakit o~u ɾao~uʦan ħo~uŋti patirəŋaj to~u kimpo~u, ro~uma no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ ħo~uŋti kitakit, o~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ ħo~uŋti ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u nio~u~uə kitakit. o~u kakitaan no~u nio~u~uə kitakit o~u sakakaaj no~u sifo~u. ɾo~umao~uʦan ɾao~uʦan no~u nio~u~uə kitakit o~u pako~uniraan ɾəkapo~utan nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ ko~u mitəɾəkaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u nio~u~uə kitakit. miro~uʦo~ukaj to~u ʦəʦajaj ɾao~uʦa ko~u ɾao~uʦan no~u nio~u~uə , nai ** a iiŋ a sakapo~ut, o~uja ** iiŋ tamɬ~ɮaw o~u nano~u ** a saʡətaɾ nijaro~uʡ a niʦikəro~uħan, ro~uma * tamɬ~ɮaw o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan ni piɾiʡan ko~u sakaira. ʦəʦaj ɾəkaɬ~ɮ no~u ɾao~uʦan * miħəʦa. o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ɾao~uʦan o~u nai papo~utaɾaj no~u ɾao~uʦan nipiɾiʡan, awaaj ko~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a mito~upa. o~u pito~upa no~u ɾao~uʦan o~u "ɾaħo~uɬ~ɮajaj ʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u paja maaɾaaj" ɾo~uɬ~ɮo~uʦan. o~u mito~upaaj o~u ʦikikaaj to~u no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ, saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u aro~uʡ i nio~u~uə, o~u papiɾiʡən tamɬ~ɮaw saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u aro~uʡ i nio~u~uə. satənaʡ to~u kitakit satənaʡ to~u kitakit no~u nio~u~uə o~u so~ufitaj no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ sifo~u ko~u paɬ~ɮamso~u a miɬ~ɮama. kiʦaj kaʦaʦo~ufaɾiw no~u pajso~u no~u nio~u~uə o~u no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ. pirarakatan o~u pirarakatan a tajaɾ ko~u sakaira no~u kiʦaj no~u nio~u~uə, maɾito~uɾo~uaj ko~u sakaira no~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj (to~usaaj o~u nipifo~utiŋan ato~u ɾio~umaħan). i **** miħəʦa, o~u mirarakataj taŋasa to~u *** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ no~u n* pajso~u ko~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj. o~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ ħiko~uki ko~u pataɬ~ɮo~uaj to~u sakaro~umakat no~u nio~u~uə a ɬ~ɮəŋan ħiko~uki ko~usi, ʦəʦaj ɾipaj ira ko~u patatiko~uaj ħiko~uki tajra i ao~u~uʦkɾanɬ~ɮ. anini i, mipaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u sifo~u to~u piraraka a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən, sapato~uŋaɾ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u ħo~utiɾo~u, papitanam to~u piʦəro~uħ no~u pakaɬ~ɮəmaj i pirarakatan no~u nio~u~uə. po~unka kiwiko~u ʦəʦajaj ko~u ɬ~ɮajkako~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan i nio~u~uə: nio~u~uə saint ʦɾəmənt ɬ~ɮajkako~u kiwiko~u kako~ujin. pitija nawħani awaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ka papina ko~u pitija i nio~u~uə. ira ko~u nio~u~uə tiɾifi ato~u jaŋko~uŋ raɬ~ɮio~u, nao~u ħo~uso~u ko~usi i nio~u~uə ko~u miko~uwanaj ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj sinpo~un "nio~u~uə star". ro~uma ira ħo~u ko~u ro~uma ʦaɾajan pitija. kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u nio~u~uə ato~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ o~u pako~uniraaj ɾəkapo~ut kasakiħar, saka mao~uʦo~ur no~u nəw *əaɾanɬ~ɮ ko~u taɬ~ɮamanaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u tajaɾ. o~u nio~u~uə o~u nano~u tajpinjaŋ kasakitakit kaɾaɾiʦajan a ɾəkapo~ut. **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u nio~u~uə ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u makaʦaʦo~ufəɾaj.
